summary:
I have found and fixed the issue. The Nginx reverse proxy configuration in `/etc/nginx/sites-available/default` was pointing to port `5001` (`proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5001;`), but the Flask server was running on port `5000` (`app.run(host="127.0.0.1", port=5000)`). 

I updated the Nginx configuration to point to port `5000` using `sed`, and `test.sh` now completes successfully.
